af_score_components.notes: anotherai (generic name). No MCP. Documentation sparse. Purpose unclear. Early stage.
Anti-Slop Writing MCP. Has MCP. Content quality tool. Documentation moderate. No auth. Rate limits. Content creation focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: Text processing. Local tool. Output quality varies.

af_score_components.notes: Antigravity Claude Project MCP. Has MCP. Claude integration. Documentation adequate. OpenAI API key/Claude key. Rate limits. AI development focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. LLM API key required. Queries to Claude/OpenAI. Credential management.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: LLM provider reliability. Suitable for AI-powered agent development.

af_score_components.notes: Any Chat Completions MCP. Has MCP. Universal chat API. Documentation good. Multiple LLM key support. Rate limits. LLM agnostic.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Multiple API key management. Aggregation layer (credential handling). Queries routed to various LLM providers.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Aggregation reliability (multiple providers). Suitable for multi-provider LLM access.

af_score_components.notes: Any CLI MCP Server. Has MCP. CLI command execution. Documentation adequate. No auth (local). Rate limits for execution. Developer tools.

security_score_components.security_notes: CRITICAL: Arbitrary command execution (full privilege). No sandboxing. Local tool only. Credentials in command output risk. Security: relies on user trust/filesystem permissions.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Shell command reliability (depends on commands executed).

af_score_components.notes: Anybrowse MCP. Has MCP. Browser automation/web access. Documentation moderate. No built-in auth. Rate limits for web requests. Web access focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS for web calls. No auth layer (browser agent). Can access any website (phishing risk). Credentials in URLs risky. No sandboxing.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Web reliability (depends on target sites). Timeout handling important.

af_score_components.notes: Anyquery MCP. Has MCP. SQL/database query interface. Documentation good. Auth for databases. Rate limits. Database operations focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Database auth required. SQL injection risks (depends on implementation). Fine-grained DB permissions. Audit logging.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Database reliability. Suitable for data-driven agent operations.

af_score_components.notes: Anysite MCP Server. Has MCP. Generic website access. Documentation moderate. No auth. Rate limits for requests. Web access.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS for requests. No auth layer. Can access any website (phishing/malicious site risk). Credentials in URLs unsafe. No sandboxing.

af_score_components.notes: Anytype MCP. Has MCP. Knowledge/workspace management. Documentation good. Auth for Anytype. Rate limits. Personal database focused.

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Anytype auth (token-based). Personal data (sensitive). End-to-end encryption (client-side). Fine-grained access.

reliability_score_components.reliability_notes: Anytype platform reliability. Suitable for personal workspace automation.

af_score_components.notes: anzenna (unclear). Has MCP. Minimal documentation. Early stage.
